title: Tome II Act 6: The Fourth Aging Category

story.text:
# 📖 Tome II Act 6: The Fourth Aging Category
**act** · shared · narrative

Half-life decay under repeated witnessing. Bakhta-response · B (C49). A fourth aging category named distinct from chronological, biological, social.
